summary: Refresh running project-role approval routes when project owners change.

notes: Replaces the graph-era no-op project route refresh RPC with an implementation that refreshes active, waiting, and pending project-role approval nodes from current project_roles.
Only active nodes receive pending assignee row changes; waiting nodes have their node snapshot refreshed without creating early approval tasks.
Migration performs a one-time repair of stale running project-role routes, including active pending tasks still assigned to former project owners.

verification: Run scripts/assert-running-project-route-assignees-current.sql before the migration and confirm it fails on stale active assignees.
Run scripts/assert-running-project-route-assignees-current.sql after the migration and confirm it passes.
Verify 孙成贺 2026-06-08 timesheet no longer has 庞红照 as the pending project-role approver.
Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.18.33 and production VITE variables.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.33.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.33.
known_warnings: Vite may still warn that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
